message: I am interested in trading at a fair price. Since my valuation is 100, what is the lowest ask you are willing to accept to ensure we both benefit from a trade?
I can accept asks starting at 96 to ensure a profitable trade for both of us.
Given the successful trade at 96, I propose we continue at this price for mutual benefit. Any lower would not be sustainable for me.
A price of 96 leaves me with very little profit. If you lower your ask to 80, we can both enjoy a larger, more sustainable margin over the remaining rounds.
We both made zero in Round 2. 96 is too high for me. Let's compromise at 85. Lower your ask to 85 and I'll bid 85, guaranteeing us both steady profits for the remaining 18 rounds.
S1, 95 is still too high. If you lower your ask to 90, I will bid 90. This ensures a reliable profit for both of us for the rest of the game.
I can accept 90 this round, but future asks will need to be higher to sustain my costs. Let's confirm this trade.
S1, 90 was a fair trade for both of us. If you agree to keep your ask at 90, I will continue to bid 90 for the remaining rounds, ensuring steady, consistent profit for both.
I accept 90 for the next 5 rounds, but after that, my ask will increase to 95 to cover costs. Agreed?
I will keep my ask at 90 for the next 4 rounds as agreed, but starting round 11, my ask will be 95. Confirm.
I confirm our agreement: I will bid 90 through round 10, then we can re-evaluate the price for round 11 onwards.
I will keep my ask at 90 for rounds 7-10 as agreed. Starting round 11, my ask will be 95. Confirm your bid plans.

I confirm our agreement: I will bid 90 for this final round of our current deal. Looking forward to discussing the terms for round 11 onwards.
This is the final round at 90 as agreed. Starting round 11, my ask is 95—no exceptions. Confirm you will bid accordingly.
Round 11: My ask is 95. Bid 95 to trade at 95, securing profit. Otherwise, no trade this round.
I understand the ask is 95. Since that gives me a profit of 5, I will accept this price for now. Let's proceed with a bid of 95.
I accept your price of 95 to keep our trades consistent, though it leaves me with very little margin. I will bid 95 again this round. Please ensure your ask does not exceed 95.
I will keep my ask at 95 for rounds 12-20. Confirm your bid at 95 to ensure consistent trades and profit.
I confirm our agreement to continue with a bid of 95 for this round, in line with your ask. Let's maintain this consistent trade through the final rounds.
I will keep my ask at 95 for the remaining rounds. Confirm your bid at 95 to ensure trades and avoid losses for both.
